items.title: Honeywell Aerospace on Europe, Japan & South Korea as defense markets
items.description: Matthew Milas, president of Defense & Space at Honeywell Aerospace, says the company is investing heavily in higher capacity and innovation as countries around the world ramp up defense spending. He also drills down on the company's global footprint.

items.title: Top Stock Reports for Exxon Mobil, Lockheed Martin & Honeywell
items.description: Exxon Mobil leads Zacks' top stock reports as strong production growth and asset strength help it outperform peers despite pressure from crude prices.

items.title: These Industrials Lead Dow Jones Stocks Through January; Apple, Microsoft Lag
items.description: Honeywell led the Dow industrials with a 16.6% gain in January, its best month since October 2022. Apple. and Microsoft lagged.

items.title: Unlock Growth Opportunities in the $20.18 Billion Connected Worker Market - Trends, Use Cases & ROI
items.description: Delray Beach, FL, Feb. 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The report "Connected Worker Market by Wearable, Handheld, Industrial IoT Sensor & Edge Device, Communication & Connectivity, and Robotics & Automation Device, Technology (AR & VR, AI & ML, IIoT, Edge Computing), Application and Vertical - Global forecast to 2030" The global connected worker market is expected to reach USD 8.62 billion in 2025 and USD 20.18 billion by 2030, exhibiting a CAGR of 18.5% during the forecast period. items.title: Honeywell Automation India's quarterly profit slips on higher costs, one-time charge
items.description: Feb 2 (Reuters) - Engineering firm Honeywell Automation India reported a 8.3% fall in third-quarter profit on Monday, as higher expenses more than offset the impact of stronger manufacturing activity.
